programme.desc: S01 E06 — Antietam Two years into the Civil War, the Union is losing the fight and desperately needs a victory to stop Robert E. Lee's push north; near Sharpsburg, Md., Union troops take a stand in a battle that could save America or end it for good.
programme.title: Kelsey Grammer's Historic Battles for America

programme.desc: S01 E07 — Vicksburg In the spring of 1863, the Civil War enters its third bloody year; for the North, the clearest path to victory runs through the last Confederate holdout, Vicksburg, but taking the fortified city amid unforgiving terrain may require a miracle.
programme.title: Kelsey Grammer's Historic Battles for America

programme.desc: S01 E08 — Battle of the Little Bighorn America's push west forces conflicts with Native tribes; driven by ego, George Custer launches a doomed assault against a large band of Indigenous warriors, now enshrined as "Custer's Last Stand."
programme.title: Kelsey Grammer's Historic Battles for America

programme.desc: S01 E01 — Bunker Hill Over a year before the Declaration of Independence, America is born at Bunker Hill; the first major battle of the revolution is also its bloodiest.
programme.title: Kelsey Grammer's Historic Battles for America

programme.desc: S01 E02 — Brooklyn As British warships fill the New York harbor, George Washington rallies his Continental Army for the biggest battle of the revolution; with his men backed into a corner on Brooklyn Heights, it takes a miracle to survive.
programme.title: Kelsey Grammer's Historic Battles for America
